calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-04-2011 Continued To Apr-18-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-10-2011 Continued To Apr-04-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Abby Feinman for Irving Pfeffer.

Commissioner Kaplan disclosed that she knew Marcia Roltner, that Marcia was a friend of a friend, and that the Executor is an Attorney and a Judge Pro Tem settlement conference Judge in this court that she met and worked closely with when she was the Judicial Officer in the Unlawful Detainer matters. Ms. Feinman stated that she had spoken with Ms. Roltner, that she always related to her that her assets would pass to Mr. Pfeffer, that Ms. Roltner had charitable intentions and that she believes those were Ms. Roltner's wishes. In addition, Ms. Feinman stated that the fair market value of the Trust assets as of the date of death were $121,000.00 in liquid assets and that she did not know the current value. The Court finds that the wording of the will does not include the cash which brings Ms. Feinman to either getting waivers of account or preparing an accounting. The matter was continued to April 4, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Examiner will communicate with Ms. Feinman.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
